note: Hand-curated gold (CR1.3) — port ML text analysis into the introspect reflect command.

gold.task_summary: Port the ML text-analysis functionality from analyze_text.py into introspect_sessions.py as an --engine option on the reflect command, move the ML dependencies into the sibling test file, then delete analyze_text.py and remove every reference to it under .claude/skills/introspect/.
gold.patterns: Consolidate a standalone helper script into an existing CLI as a subcommand/engine option; declare a sibling test file's dependencies via PEP-723 inline metadata rather than extra make-target --run flags.
gold.decisions_values: Achieve full functionality parity in the port; prefer PEP-723 inline deps over ad-hoc make --run arguments; remove the old script entirely once its functionality is ported so no dead references remain.
